overview: Complete Hospital Management & Appointment Booking System for Noheria Nursing Home, Panchkula. Includes a public one-page website, full admin panel for managing appointments, doctors, blog CMS, and all website content, plus a doctor panel — all with Internet Identity authentication and role-based access.
features: One-page public website with Hero, Services, Doctors, Appointment Booking, Blog, Testimonials, FAQ, and Contact sections
Smart appointment booking with available slot display, no double booking, and auto-doctor assignment
Full Admin Panel: manage appointments, doctors, analytics dashboard, and all website content editing
Blog CMS: create, edit, publish, and delete blog posts and videos with image uploads
Doctor Panel: doctors view and manage their own appointments
Internet Identity login with Admin and Doctor role-based access control
Analytics dashboard with appointment trend charts and doctor performance stats
Audit logs for all system actions
